## Current Blockers Panel

All RED tasks roll up to one of three root causes. FXGUNIT must resolve these in order:

### Blocker 1 — DNS Not Configured (blocks P02, P03, P05, P06, P07)
`bff.traders.app`, `api.traders.app`, and `staging.traders.app` return NXDOMAIN.

**Action:** Follow `docs/STAGE_P_DNS_SETUP.md` — create A records for Railway BFF and ML Engine IPs, CNAME for staging.

---

### Blocker 2 — No Secrets in GitHub Actions (blocks P08, P09, P10)
Live probe confirms **0 Actions secrets** and only **7/13 required variables** populated. Specifically missing:

| Category | Missing Items |
|----------|--------------|
| **Infisical** | `INFISICAL_TOKEN` |
| **Railway** | `RAILWAY_TOKEN`, `RAILWAY_SERVICE_TOKEN` |
| **Vercel** | `VERCEL_TOKEN`, `VERCEL_ORG_ID`, `VERCEL_PROJECT_ID` |
| **Monitoring** | `SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL`, `DISCORD_WEBHOOK_URL`, `PAGERDUTY_ROUTING_KEY` |

See Secrets Checklist section below for live status.

**Action:** Run `python scripts/setup-infisical.ps1` and `python scripts/setup-production.ps1`, then add all missing secrets via GitHub UI or `gh secret set`.

---

### Blocker 3 — Frontend Routes to Wrong Domain (blocks P04, P07)
`https://traders.app/` HTTP 302 redirects to `https://stocks.news/` instead of the TradersApp app.

**Action:** In Vercel dashboard, remove any redirect rule from `traders.app` to `stocks.news/`, then redeploy: `vercel --prod`.

---

### Blocker 4 — CI Fails Before Deploy Step (blocks P09)
Latest completed CI run (`#24475365616`, 2026-04-15T19:58:28Z) failed with:

| Job | Result | Root Cause |
|-----|--------|-----------|
| Unit Tests | FAIL | Import error: `ml_engine.features.candle_features` |
| BFF Server | FAIL | Railway token missing — deployment skipped |
| UI Quality Matrix | FAIL | Focus-visible + label contract issues (19 failures) |
| Browser Compatibility | FAIL | 21 failures; Inter font CDN blocked in CI environment |

**Action:** Fix import path in unit test config, add Railway token to secrets, then re-run CI.

---

## Action Required — FXGUNIT Do These Now

### Step 1: Collect Railway Public IPs (5 minutes)
1. Log in to [Railway](https://railway.app) → TradersApp project
2. For each service (BFF, ML Engine): Settings → Networking → copy Public IP
3. Record them for Step 2

### Step 2: Add DNS Records (10 minutes)
Follow `docs/STAGE_P_DNS_SETUP.md`. Create these records at your registrar:

```
bff.traders.app     A   [Railway BFF IP]       DNS only
api.traders.app     A   [Railway ML Engine IP]  DNS only
staging.traders.app CNAME [Vercel staging URL]  DNS only
```

Use [Google Toolbox Dig](https://toolbox.googleapps.com/apps/dig/) to verify each resolves before continuing.

### Step 3: Add All Missing Secrets (15 minutes)
Run or manually set each secret:

```bash
# Infisical
gh secret set INFISICAL_TOKEN --body "your-token"

# Railway
gh secret set RAILWAY_TOKEN --body "your-token"
gh secret set RAILWAY_SERVICE_TOKEN --body "your-token"

# Vercel
gh secret set VERCEL_TOKEN --body "your-token"
gh secret set VERCEL_ORG_ID --body "your-org-id"
gh secret set VERCEL_PROJECT_ID --body "your-project-id"

# Monitoring
gh secret set SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL --body "https://hooks.slack.com/..."
gh secret set DISCORD_WEBHOOK_URL --body "https://discord.com/api/webhooks/..."
gh secret set PAGERDUTY_ROUTING_KEY --body "your-pagerduty-key"
```

### Step 4: Fix Frontend Redirect (5 minutes)
In Vercel dashboard → project → Settings → Domains: remove redirect from `traders.app` to `stocks.news/`. Then run:

```bash
vercel --prod
```

### Step 5: Re-run CI (5 minutes after secrets are in)
Push any minor fix or re-run via GitHub UI:
https://github.com/FXGUNIT/TradersApp/actions/workflows/ci.yml

## How to Refresh This Dashboard

Run these commands in a terminal to pull fresh data:

```bash
# Refresh GitHub secrets list
gh api repos/FXGUNIT/TradersApp/actions/secrets --paginate

# Refresh GitHub variables list
gh api repos/FXGUNIT/TradersApp/actions/variables --paginate

# Refresh latest CI runs
gh run list --workflow ci.yml --limit 5

# Re-run public probe
python scripts/stage_p_public_probe.py

# Re-run CI
gh run run-workflow --name "CI/CD Pipeline"
```

Then re-generate this dashboard by running Claude Code and prompting: "Refresh docs/STAGE_P_MASTER_DASHBOARD.md with latest GitHub API data."
